title: Flotage
body:
# Flotage description
Are you troubled by not being able to easily set up camp at sea?

This mod adds some blocks that can help you to do it.

There are a few new blocks that can be placed directly on water like raft and racks that help you dry kelp.
Besides, rack with bucket can catch rainwater.

You can also use datapacks to add own recipes to the rack.   
Support JEI recipe display.  
Kubejs and Crt are supported from version 0.1.3.  

Have a good time with Flotage.

# Others
The author supports and encourages adding this mod to any modpack.

To present your translation, go to Github.

Notice:The Author don't come to curseforge often.Please report Bug on github.
